title: KuvaLich
description: Bring Warframe's Kuva Lich system to Minecraft! Weapon mods, Warframe mods, and Riven rolling!
body:
# Overview
Want to experience Warframe in Minecraft? This mod allows you to battle the Kuva Lich in Minecraft, equip your weapons with various mods, and even gives players the authentic experience of unveiling Riven mods!

When players are forced to abandon their favorite weapons due to low damage stats, they can install various mods to turn them into top-notch weapons that suit their needs! If you're interested in RPGs, this mod is a must-try!

To install this mod, GeckoLib is required as a prerequisite.

In this document, "Mod" mostly refers to an unofficial content expansion for Minecraft, while "mod" mostly refers to the game content similar to the mods in the game Warframe that are made based on this Mod.

This mod is not purely a fan-tribute mod without practical value. On the contrary, it can transform the entire weapon system, allowing all weapons to be equipped with various builds instead of being limited to fixed enchantments or stat combinations. It is perfectly suited for adventure and RPG-oriented modpacks or servers, and allows you to customize various affixes and modules according to your needs.

For modpack or server authors, this Mod provides config files to uniformly adjust the values of all built-in mod cards, allowing you to match your modpack's or server's balancing needs; you can also create fully custom mod cards from scratch.

If you have TACZ (TimelessAndClassicsZero) installed alongside this Mod, a large number of TACZ-related mods and stat affixes will automatically become available, offering seamless firearm integration. For example, Multishot can turn a single bullet into two or more, and affixes like Fire Rate and Reload Speed will take real effect — making it the best way to power up your firearms.

![开光武器](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b173d516d07826058153bf22e8a2e28af294deb2_0.webp)
![增加模组](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81996eb48fa2f7a5977394c51832813ef37d06bf_0.webp)
![怪物](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe7d9effc5c663f93e261e5aa54175084415bef2_0.webp)
 
# FAQ
Q: Can I play this Mod without having played Warframe?
A: Absolutely, but those who have played Warframe will be more familiar with the gameplay here.

Q: How do I play this Mod?
A: The author will release a detailed tutorial, but here's a brief overview:

After enchanting a pickaxe with Requiem Destroyed, breaking Requiem Ore will drop Bronze, Silver, and Gold level mods as well as Requiem Card;

Craft a Requiem Gate and defeat Kuva Slave to increase decryption progress;

View the decrypted answers in the Requiem Gate, but the order may not match the interface;

Based on the decrypted answers, try arranging different mod orders to defeat the Kuva Lich and decrypt;
After getting the correct decryption order, defeat the Kuva Master to obtain the Kuva-exclusive weapon and receive a large amount of materials and Prime or Riven mods as a bonus!

Use the drops from Kuva Slave and Kuva Master to craft various workbenches;

Equip weapon mods in the Requiem Weapon Table for super powerful bonuses, while Warframe mods are equipped in the Requiem Warframe Table;

Requiem weapons come with a fixed polarity, but if you want to install mods on other weapons, you need to use Riven Slivers in the Requiem Evolve for polarization to obtain random polarities before installing mods.

Q: Can all weapons be modded?

A: Yes, not only the items from this Mod and vanilla Minecraft, but also items from all other mods can be modded and will receive attribute bonuses normally. For example, the Daikatana shown below, even firearms and magic wands can benefit from mods! Therefore, matching different mod builds based on the stats can greatly increase replayability!

Q: Does this Mod support TACZ (TimelessAndClassicsZero)?

A: Yes. Once TACZ is installed, a large number of firearm-exclusive mods and stat affixes will automatically appear, including Multishot, Fire Rate, Reload Speed, and more — all fully functional, allowing your firearms to enjoy the complete mod build experience.
